name: ponytail-gain
tagline: Renders a static ASCII scoreboard of ponytail's benchmark code/cost/speed savings; no repo edits.
verdict: Safe, read-only display skill with a clear honesty boundary against fabricating per-repo savings numbers. Minor gaps: no versioning signal, and the description doesn't state a concrete invocation trigger.

highlights.summary: Description states what it shows but not a concrete trigger phrase or situation for invocation.
No version field or changelog anywhere in the skill.
